gauge.name: Rio Camuy near Bayaney

impacts.statement: Rio Camuy out of its banks - Road 119 and Road 4491 flooded/impassable at the coastal areas in Hatillo.Calle San Jose, Calle Joaquin Martinez, Calle Ferrocarril likely to be affected. OMS/5.2019Unlikely to observe river flooding  at Camuy - river runs through a cannon. If there is river flooding, it will be near the coast between Camuy and Hatillo. OMS/6.2019Soils across these areas are porous. Therefore, there is a lot of percolation. OMS/6.2019

dataAttribution.title: Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
